description: Trivy vulnerability findings exported as OTLP logs (service.name=trivy-scan, event.name=security.vulnerability)
title: Trivy Vulnerabilities (OTLP Logs)

widgets.description: Total unique vulnerabilities found in selected time range

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security'

widgets.title: TOTAL

widgets.description: Unique medium severity vulnerabilities in selected time range

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'MEDIUM'

widgets.title: MEDIUM

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'CRITICAL'

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'LOW'

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan_per_image AS (SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS image, max(timestamp) AS latest_ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY image) SELECT toFloat64(count()) AS value, now() AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 l INNER JOIN latest_scan_per_image s ON coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') = s.image AND l.timestamp = s.latest_ts WHERE l.ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND l.resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND l.attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND l.attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' AND upper(coalesce(nullIf(l.attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(l.attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(l.severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) = 'HIGH'

widgets.description: Scan runs over time, split by severity counts per scan

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(timestamp) AS ts, tupleElement(sev_cnt, 1) AS severity, toFloat64(tupleElement(sev_cnt, 2)) AS value FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 ARRAY JOIN [('LOW', toInt64OrZero(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['scan.vulnerability.count.low'], ''), '0'))), ('MEDIUM', toInt64OrZero(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['scan.vulnerability.count.medium'], ''), '0'))), ('HIGH', toInt64OrZero(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['scan.vulnerability.count.high'], ''), '0'))), ('CRITICAL', toInt64OrZero(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['scan.vulnerability.count.critical'], ''), '0')))] AS sev_cnt WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' ORDER BY ts ASC, severity ASC

widgets.title: Scans Over Time (by Severity)

widgets.description: Detailed vulnerability rows with title and URL

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(max(timestamp)) AS "Last Seen", coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['library'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['package.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['package'], '')) AS "Library", coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['vulnerability.id'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['vulnerability_id'], '')) AS "Vulnerability", upper(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) AS "Severity", coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['vulnerability.status'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['status'], ''), 'unknown') AS "Status", coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['installed_version'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['package.version'], '')) AS "Installed Version", coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['fixed_version'], ''), '') AS "Fixed Version", coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['vulnerability.title'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['title'], ''), '') AS "Title", coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['vulnerability.reference'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['primary_url'], ''), '') AS "URL", count() AS "Occurrences" FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY "Library", "Vulnerability", "Severity", "Status", "Installed Version", "Fixed Version", "Title", "URL" ORDER BY "Last Seen" DESC, "Severity" DESC LIMIT 200

widgets.title: Latest Vulnerabilities (Detailed)

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS "Image", argMax(toInt64OrZero(attributes_string['scan.vulnerability.count']), timestamp) AS "Vulnerabilities" FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY "Image" ORDER BY "Vulnerabilities" DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.description: Latest scan vulnerabilities grouped by whether a fixed version is available

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan AS (SELECT max(timestamp) AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security') SELECT if(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['fixed_version'], ''), '') = '', 'No Fix Version', 'Fix Version Available') AS "Fix State", count() AS "Count" FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp = (SELECT ts FROM latest_scan) AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY "Fix State" ORDER BY "Count" DESC

widgets.title: Fix Version Availability (Latest Scan)

widgets.description: Shows latest scan outcome per image, including clean scans with zero vulnerabilities

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['container.image.name'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['image'], ''), 'unknown') AS "Image", fromUnixTimestamp64Nano(max(timestamp)) AS "Last Scan", argMax(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['security.scan.result'], ''), 'unknown'), timestamp) AS "Result", argMax(toInt64OrZero(attributes_string['scan.vulnerability.count']), timestamp) AS "Vulnerability Count" FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY "Image" ORDER BY "Last Scan" DESC

widgets.title: Latest Scan Result by Image

widgets.description: Pie view of vulnerability severities for the latest scan

clickhouse_sql.name: A
clickhouse_sql.query: WITH latest_scan AS (SELECT max(timestamp) AS ts FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp >= $start_timestamp_nano AND timestamp <= $end_timestamp_nano AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.scan.summary' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security') SELECT upper(coalesce(nullIf(attributes_string['severity'], ''), nullIf(attributes_string['vulnerability.severity'], ''), nullIf(severity_text, ''), 'UNKNOWN')) AS "Severity", count() AS "Count" FROM signoz_logs.distributed_logs_v2 WHERE ts_bucket_start BETWEEN $start_timestamp - 1800 AND $end_timestamp AND timestamp = (SELECT ts FROM latest_scan) AND resource.`service.name`::String = 'trivy-scan' AND attributes_string['event.name'] = 'security.vulnerability' AND attributes_string['event.domain'] = 'security' GROUP BY "Severity" ORDER BY "Count" DESC

widgets.title: Severity Split (Latest Scan)
